title: You ever wonder how the design of EVA 01 was born
display_title: You ever wonder how the design of EVA 01 was born
wikitext:
[]: You ever wonder how the design of EVA-01 was born?             Quote Post by Man Chong » Sun May 29, 2005 3:33 pm Well, ladies and gentlemen, here's your answer! http://img182.echo.cx/img182/7880/birthofeva0vy.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun May 29, 2005 4:00 pm Well I cant argue with that. Anyway I want to see the mass production evas fight it out with a giant Barney! Barney looks so chubby, can you imagine it, they'll be ripping out chunks of gooey Barney fat and eating it! No way they'll be able to keep their supermodel figures after that!

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon May 30, 2005 12:12 am they'll be ripping out chunks of gooey Barney fat and eating it!

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon May 30, 2005 12:14 am It curtainly explains where the purple and green fits in , lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon May 30, 2005 1:13 am And you think they look like svpermodels, eh?

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Mon May 30, 2005 6:26 am I like the idea that deep down unit 01 is a big fluffie purple dino who just wants to hug everyone. Unit 01: Gimme a hug. Kaworu: Ahhhhhhhhhhh.

[]:             Quote Post by JinKazama » Mon May 30, 2005 8:42 am LOL, anyway the MP Evas always reminds me of Donald Duck I don't know why and I think they looked cuter than the 'good guys'(Evas 00-02). [url]http://www.ehapa.de/70_Jahre_Donald_Duck/reqRessources/img/donald.jpg[/url] [url]http://mywebpages.comcast.net/juzzam1/NGEpix/ProdEva.JPG[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Fri Jun 03, 2005 9:22 pm Tsk, tsk, someones been to 4Chan's /M, haven't they? I kinda agree with it though

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Sat Jun 04, 2005 5:18 am EVA-01X wrote: Tsk, tsk, someones been to 4Chan's /M, haven't they? I kinda agree with it though

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Sat Jun 04, 2005 2:04 pm Oh right, thats where it was... I frequent both, so its hard to keep track at times... And no shame in being a dirty hentai... there're quite a few of us out there ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jun 04, 2005 3:00 pm Depends on what sort of stuff you are fapping to.

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Sat Jun 04, 2005 3:33 pm Can't you just look at it, I mean you don't have to "fap", right?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jun 04, 2005 3:48 pm anatrok wrote: Can't you just look at it, I mean you don't have to "fap", right?

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Sat Jun 04, 2005 4:45 pm Since when did visiting an image board with hentai on it instantly make you fap off at the pr0n? I mean, pr0n isn't the only reason to visit those boards, and it has never been mine. I wrote the "I'm a dirty hentai" comment because most people associates that board with hentai, which is kinda sad.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jun 04, 2005 5:56 pm Ryo wrote: Since when did visiting an image board with hentai on it instantly make you fap off at the pr0n? I mean, pr0n isn't the only reason to visit those boards, and it has never been mine. I wrote the "I'm a dirty hentai" comment because most people associates that board with hentai, which is kinda sad.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Jun 04, 2005 6:17 pm I go their for desk tops and the odd porn0 if I deem it worthy :P .

[]:             Quote Post by KIC » Tue Jun 07, 2005 6:02 am Reichu wrote: The place is crawling with it, and people who have to wipe their own fluids off their computer monitor at least two times every day.

[]:             Quote Post by Prons » Thu Jun 09, 2005 1:23 am That image is pretty funny. The Evangelion arms remind me of Ideon, in praticular the size and length of the shoulders.

[]: Um             Quote Post by Tsukasa Shido » Thu Jun 30, 2005 8:10 pm Well the Evangelions are ment to look like Adam the angel that caused Second Impact in the first place.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Thu Jun 30, 2005 10:22 pm 4chan's /m/ has some nice pics every once in a while. Ugh, I can barely stand /b/ though and I just avoid all the other boards.
